word: H8556 - תִּמְנַת חֶרֶס - Timnath Chereç - tim-nath kheh'-res - Timnath-heres

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּמנת סרח תּמנת חרס

Transliteration: timnath cheres timnath serach

Phonetic: tim-nath kheh'-res

BDB Definition:

Timnath-heres or Timnath-serah = "portion of the sun"
  1. a city given to Joshua as a inheritance in the mountains of Ephraim on the north of the hill of Gaash where he was buried

Origin: from H8553 and H2775

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
